# KP Solutions

> Bespoke software for businesses that want their tools to fit how they actually work. Websites are one deliverable shape among many; the product is software that solves operational problems. KP Solutions is a one-person bespoke software studio based in Loughborough, East Midlands, UK, working operator-to-operator (and remotely across the UK) rather than agency-to-procurement.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://kpsolutions.io/): Overview of KP Solutions and how the studio works.
- [Services](https://kpsolutions.io/services): The four shapes of bespoke software — bespoke platforms and internal tools, modernization & replacement, integrations & automation, and AI-visible web presence.
- [Work](https://kpsolutions.io/work): Potter Sanctuary — a bookings and client-management platform with an operator admin portal, built and shipped in four weeks.
- [Process](https://kpsolutions.io/process): The Four Week Build — brief on Monday, live four Fridays later, fixed fee, code owned by you.
- [Pricing](https://kpsolutions.io/pricing): One fixed fee, agreed before any build work begins. No per-seat fees, no lock-in. Optional retainers available for post-launch support, changes, and ongoing partnership.
- [Contact](https://kpsolutions.io/contact): How to start a conversation about a project.
